---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability, adapter, or routing behavior
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed idea

Describe the feature or change you want.

## Why the broker should own this

Explain why this belongs in the broker layer instead of in a downstream skill, MCP server, or host.

## Example workflow

What should the user be able to say or do?

## Alternatives considered

What are the simpler or existing alternatives?

## Additional context

Anything else we should know?
